---
title: "George Herbert Moberly"
---

## George Herbert Moberly

**Dates:** (3 Jan 1837-30 April 1895)

### Description

eldest son of the Rt. Rev. George Moberly

### Biography

He married (5 February 1870) Esther de Castro (1842-1929).

### Letters

- Letter from June 1855.
- Letter from [summer 1855]
- Letter from [November or December 1851[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from [November or December 1850?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
